subject: [PATCH v6 11/15] mm/pagemap: add PAGE_IS_ACCESSED for RWP tracking

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch adds a new category to the pagemap, called PAGE_IS_ACCESSED, which tracks read-write protection (RWP) in userfaultfd (UFFD). It introduces a new bit in the PTE that is used to indicate whether a page has been accessed under RWP. The patch also updates the documentation and code to reflect this change, ensuring that UFFDIO_WRITEPROTECT and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT are properly distinguished. This change allows for more precise tracking of page access patterns and improves the accuracy of pagemap information.
